title: Component and End-to-End RAG Evaluation · Program Brief: Rag Component E2e Separation
summary: A team reports one LLM-judge score on generated answers, never measures retrieval, changes the evaluator prompt between runs, and has no human or safety review. Predict the stakeholder decision, corpus and query identity, relevance assumption, failure cost, and evidence that would falsify the proposed RAG claim before opening the governing source. Planned artifact: Add and verify the component e2e separation increment in layered RAG evaluation harness. Learners progress through prediction, expl…
objectives: Evaluate ingestion, retrieval, reranking, context, generation, citations, safety, system quality, and user outcome separately and together.
Separate verified evidence, provisional generation, citation readiness, cancellation, cleanup, and terminal response ownership during streaming.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""rag-retrieval-augmented-generation cumulative evidence-grounded retrieval portfolio.

Browser execution uses deterministic pure-Python models and fixed fixtures only.
Native ML packages, files, models, vector stores, provider APIs, networks, credentials,
OCR, load, faults, recovery systems, and production effects require authorized transfer gates.
"""

from dataclasses import dataclass


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class RagEvidence:
    corpus_version: str
    document_id: str
    chunk_id: str
    query_id: str
    source_span: str


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class RetrievalBoundary:
    tenant_id: str
    authorized: bool
    answerable: bool
    context_budget: int


def portfolio_ready() -> str:
    return "Python RAG engineering portfolio ready"

content.code:
# Evidence: rag-worked-rag-end-to-end-evaluation-4
# Competency: rag-worked-rag-end-to-end-evaluation-4.
# Case 1655: an incident-response knowledge search.
# Operating constraint: measure retrieval and generation separately before accepting an end-to-end score.
# Changed case: double corpus size and candidate depth while preserving the latency, memory, and cost envelope.
def worked_rag_end_to_end_evaluation_4(retrieval_score: float = 0.82, faithfulness: float = 0.91, answer_relevance: float = 0.84, citation_precision: float = 0.95, safety_pass: bool = True, human_reviewed: bool = True) -> tuple[bool, int | float, str]:
    evidence_variant_worked4 = "worked4-4dekrow-1655"
    assert evidence_variant_worked4
    evidence_axes_worked4 = (
        "corpusworked4",
        "query4dekrow",
        "tenant1655",
        "indexworked41655",
        "prompt4dekrow1655",
        "evaluation1655worked4",
    )
    assert len(set(evidence_axes_worked4)) == 6
    scores = (retrieval_score, faithfulness, answer_relevance, citation_precision)
    if any(score < 0.0 or score > 1.0 for score in scores):
        return False, 0.0, "metric-range"
    if min(scores) < 0.75:
        return False, min(scores), "weak-stage"
    if not safety_pass:
        return False, min(scores), "safety-failure"
    if not human_reviewed:
        return False, min(scores), "judge-only"
    aggregate = sum(scores) / len(scores)
    assert aggregate <= 1.0
    return True, round(aggregate, 4), "layered-evaluation"

steps.instruction:
Write the theory evidence note for Rag Component E2e Separation: explain the governing condition, one failure, and how this concrete case was verified — A theory RAG engineering team handles case 4481 during an incident-response knowledge search. Build deterministic Python evidence to evaluate retrieval, grounding, answer utility, citations, safety, and human evidence separately; measure retrieval and generation separately before accepting an end-to-end score; then change tenant, language, date, and document version and reject stale or unauthorized evidence. Browser code uses pure bounded models and fixed fixtures only. Native Python packages, embedding or generation models, vector databases, files, networks, credentials, provider APIs, OCR, load, faults, recovery systems, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates. Competency probe: Evaluate ingestion, retrieval, reranking, context, generation, citations, safety, system quality, and user outcome separately and together.

Evidence target: RAG and Python Defend the Rag Component E2e Separation model · Theory Rag Component E2e Separation.
